)\",\"op\":\"replace_exact\",\"source\":\"\",\"text\":\"\"},{\"anchor\":\"\",\"function\":\"build_scheduler\",\"new\":\"def build_scheduler(optimizer: optim.Optimizer, steps_per_epoch: int):\\n    if not USE_LR_SCHEDULE:\\n        return None\\n    total_steps = TRAIN_MAX_STEPS if TRAIN_MAX_STEPS is not None else steps_per_epoch * 100\\n    return optim.lr_scheduler.CosineAnnealingLR(\\n        optimizer,\\n        T_max=max(1, total_steps),\\n        eta_min=LEARNING_RATE * 0.05,\\n    )\",\"old\":\"\",\"op\":\"replace_function\",\"source\":\"\",\"text\":\"\"}],\"primary_mode\":\"layout\",\"rationale\":\"Widen and deepen the micro-ResNet, make the channel multiplier active, and align AdamW plus cosine decay to the actual step budget for better optimization under a fixed-step checker.\",\"secondary_modes\":[\"indexing\",\"summaries\",\"caching\"]}"}}
